title: Improve Search Performance

story.i_want: receive first page search results within 3 seconds

journey.before: User navigates to search page with existing filters
journey.during: User enters search criteria and applies filters, waiting for results
journey.after: User reviews search results and may refine search or select a tactic

capability_breakdown.core_action: Search for active tactics with filters and receive results within 3 seconds

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester When I use any existing search filters Then the filters continue to work as before And the search results are returned within 3 seconds
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Apply search filters and get results quickly

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester and I previously completed a search and a NEW Tactic was just created When I search again Then the new tactic should be included in the search results AND the search results should be returned within 3 seconds
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: See newly created tactics in search results

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a search query is submitted When results are rendered Then load time is under 3 seconds

edge_cases.gherkin: Given a search query with no matching tactics When search completes Then 'No tactics found' message is displayed within 3 seconds
edge_cases.jtbd: Know when search yields no results

edge_cases.gherkin: Given a search query matching 1000+ tactics When search completes Then first page results are returned within 3 seconds
Given multiple users performing searches simultaneously When searches are submitted Then each returns results within 3 seconds
Given a search with multiple complex filters applied When search completes Then results are returned within 3 seconds

open_questions.question: What is the current baseline search performance? Are there specific queries that are slow?
What are the current filter types and complexity? How are they implemented?
What is the expected data volume (number of tactics) for the search?
Are there any caching strategies already in place that should be leveraged?

related: Any other stories that depend on search performance
Stories that modify tactic data structure

recommendation: Proceed with implementation. Recommend starting with database query analysis and indexing optimization, followed by performance testing to validate the 3-second SLA. Clarify open questions with stakeholders before finalizing optimization approach.
